    print("After nodes:", len(after_seg['nodes']))
    # List all before nodes
    print("\nBefore nodes:")
    for n in before_seg['nodes']:
        print(f"  {n['id']}: {n['color']}, {n['pixels']}px, {n['boundary']}")
